features.name: defparam with hierarchical instance path
features.description: Code should include a defparam statement that overrides a module instance parameter using a hierarchical path like top.m1.size

features.name: parameterized port width with size-dependent range
features.description: Code should include an input port declared with a size parameter used in the range, creating variable-width vector

features.name: defparam from separate unrelated module
features.description: Code should include a defparam in a module that is not part of the target module's hierarchy, attempting to override parameters across unrelated modules
